новости о криптовалюте и биткоине

Основатель и генеральный директор BitMart сообщил, что глобальная биржа криптовалют пострадала от серьезного нарушения безопасности, которое позволило хакерам украсть цифровые активы на сотни миллионов долларов.

Binance Custody @binance
Nov 26

Binance Custody is now live with segregated cold storage, suitable for long-term holdings. This marks another step forward in Binance's digital asset ecosystem.

We aim to provide a seamless gateway for institutional investors to access crypto.

and launches stablecoins promotion - as low as 0% daily interest rate!

Stay tuned for more to come.

In few minutes Tether will coordinate with a 3rd party to perform a chain swap (converting from Tron TRC20 to Ethereum ERC20) for 1B USDt. The # tether total supply will not change during this process.

Learn more about chain swaps tether.to/explained-chai…
